# device: R3
$ show ip bgp summary
IPv4 Unicast Summary (VRF default):
BGP router identifier 10.0.0.3, local AS number 65003 vrf-id 0
Neighbor        V         AS   MsgRcvd   MsgSent   TblVer  InQ OutQ  Up/Down State/PfxRcd
10.0.13.1       4      65001         0         0        0    0    0    never       Active
10.0.23.2       4      65002       142       145        5    0    0 01:58:21            3

$ show ip bgp neighbors 10.0.13.1
BGP neighbor is 10.0.13.1, remote AS 65001, local AS 65003, external link
  BGP state = Active
  Last reset never
  No active TCP connection

$ show running-config bgpd
router bgp 65003
 neighbor 10.0.13.1 remote-as 65001
 neighbor 10.0.13.1 timers 3 9
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  network 10.0.0.3/32
 exit-address-family
